suggest.weline/module-api: Enables API documentation collection in the developer workspace.
suggest.weline/module-seo: Enables the optional developer SEO crawl and audit endpoint.
suggest.weline/module-server: Enables shared developer payloads and WLS performance traces.
suggest.weline/module-visitor: Shares the optional production panel access token configuration.
suggest.weline/module-websites: Provides website-scoped currency choices for developer documentation.
